text: Ladies and gentlemen, welcome aboard Morshu Airways flight MM21. In case of emergency, use the ROPE to escape, the LAMP OIL as a source of light, and BOMBS to attract attention. Alcoholic beverages will be for sale shortly. If you want it, it's yours, as long as you have enough rubies. Sorry, we can't give credit. Finally, please be aware that the MMM sign has been switched on.

text:
Morshu Airlines has the following jets in their fleet:

McGanon Octorok MO-10-30 (Quantity: 13; Original quantity: 25)
Kingheed K-1011 TriForce (Quantity: 34)
Zeldaing 737-800 (Quantity: 30)
LinkCraft Stuff 800 (Quantity: 12)

The pilots working for Morshu Airlines consider the K-1011 TriForces to be the most dependable out of the entire fleet, and the MO-10-30s to be the worst, causing Morshu to sell 12 of the original 25 MO-10-30s to become...... MMMMMMMMMMM... richer!
